query:
SELECT 
  companyName,
  websiteUrl,
  status,
  prestigeScore,
  detailedReport,
  lastDeepScanAt,
  createdAt
FROM leads 
WHERE companyName LIKE '%Legacy%Heating%'
LIMIT 1;
